feature: Bolyra MCP Auth Gateway — hosted verification proxy for production MCP servers

tasks.description: Package scaffolding: package.json, tsconfig.json, jest.config.js, types.ts, empty index.ts
Config loader: YAML/JSON parsing, env var substitution, CLI flag merge, validation
tasks.test_expectation: Config tests pass: YAML load, JSON load, env var substitution, validation errors, CLI override

tasks.description: Header injection: X-Bolyra-* headers from BolyraAuthContext, optional HMAC signing
tasks.test_expectation: Header tests pass: correct header names/values, HMAC generation, HMAC verification

tasks.description: Receipt writer: file (day-rotated), stdout (NDJSON), webhook output modes
tasks.test_expectation: Receipt tests pass: file write with day rotation, stdout NDJSON, webhook POST, async non-blocking behavior

tasks.description: Health check endpoint: /healthz with upstream reachability probe
tasks.test_expectation: Health tests pass: returns 200 with status JSON, returns 503 when upstream unreachable

tasks.description: Auth middleware: extract Bolyra auth header, call verifyBundle + checkToolPolicy from @bolyra/mcp, produce 401/403 JSON-RPC errors
tasks.test_expectation: Middleware tests pass: valid bundle accepted, missing auth 401, invalid proof 401, insufficient permissions 403, JSON-RPC error format correct

tasks.description: Reverse proxy core: HTTP request forwarding, header management, upstream error handling (502), SSE passthrough, JSON-RPC method routing (only gate tools/call)
tasks.test_expectation: Proxy tests pass: non-tools/call methods forwarded without auth, tools/call gated, upstream errors return 502, X-Bolyra-* headers injected, health endpoint intercepted

tasks.description: CLI entry point: argument parsing, config merge, server startup, banner logging
Library exports: finalize index.ts with all public exports, update package.json bin field
tasks.test_expectation: Full build succeeds, dist/ produced with correct exports

tasks.description: Integration test: end-to-end proxy flow with mock upstream HTTP server, dev-mode verification, receipt output verification
tasks.test_expectation: Integration test passes: full request lifecycle

tasks.description: Documentation: README.md with quickstart, config reference, architecture diagram, library API
tasks.test_expectation: README exists with quickstart, config reference, and library API sections

intake_context.description: Hosted verification proxy that sits in front of any production MCP server. Verifies agent credentials, delegation chains, tool scopes, request binding, signatures. Enforces replay protection with nonce/jti storage. Maintains credential registry. Emits signed audit receipts for every tool call. Returns standard 401/403.
intake_context.approach: C — Standalone Node.js proxy (npx @bolyra/gateway) with middleware exported for advanced users. Proxy is the product, middleware is the escape hatch.
intake_context.sellable_sentence: Put Bolyra Gateway in front of your MCP server; we verify agent authority, prevent replay, enforce delegated scopes, and give you signed audit logs for every tool call.
